evidence.A: default_precision = 0.01 is accepted; the bug was default_precision = 0 (ValidationError: value must be > 0)
evidence.B: false: 0.01 (a non-integer float) is accepted as default_precision, so precision is not an integer shot count
evidence.C: false: EstimatorOptions.default_precision exists (hasattr=True); default_shots is a separate option, not a replacement
evidence.D: false: default_precision was set on the options object (before any run() call) without error
